endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/{resourceName}/Annotations
endpoints.description: Gets the list of annotations for a component for given time range
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/{resourceName}/Annotations
endpoints.description: Create an Annotation of an Application Insights component.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/{resourceName}/Annotations/{annotationId}
endpoints.description: Get the annotation for given id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{ANNOTATIONID}} with a real annotationid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/{resourceName}/Annotations/{annotationId}
endpoints.description: Delete an Annotation of an Application Insights component.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{ANNOTATIONID}} with a real annotationid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
